product_results.title: Apple AirPods 4 Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Headphones, Personalized Spatial Audio, Sweat- and Water-Resistant, USB-C Charging Case, H2 Chip, Up to 30 Hours of Battery Life

summary.text: Customers find these headphones to be a nice product with really good sound quality. The noise cancelling is excellent and the headphones function very well, getting the job done. However, customers have mixed opinions on the fit, listening time, comfort, and charging features.

authors_reviews.title: Best AirPods Ever, Noise Cancellation version is a must buy!
authors_reviews.text: I wanted to own a pair of Airpods but because of my sensitive ears and ear phones not staying on AirPods weren't really an option. I was gifted the AirPods Pro in 2021 and they were uncomfortable and would fall off my ears easily.Due to the issues mentioned I always used over the ear headphones (the extra comfort was an added bonus). However headphones can be bulky and isn't always easy to carry around for every occasion.I wanted to give airpods another chance and wasn't sure after my experience with the AirPods Pro. However a coworker convinced me to buy them because her partner owned the Pro. Their partner had the same issues as me, and after buying the AirPod 4, not only were they comfortable but they stayed in her ears. That sealed the deal for me, with the low price on amazon I took a chance and bought them.At first I wasn't sure because they were slightly uncomfortable, which is normal for first time users. But as time went on I barely noticed them in my ear. The sound quality is just exquisite and paired with the noise cancellation it feels like you're listening to your speakers alone in a room. I had to double check to make sure I was playing the sound off the actual air pod and not free playing the sound. That's how good it was!Even with 1 airpod the sound quality doesn't change it sounds just as good. All the problems I had with the first AirPod Pros are non existent. I highly recommend these airpods, the fitting is identical to the wired earphones that used to come with the iPhones.If you're planning to get the AirPods 4 I highly recommend getting them with the noise cancellation feature. It's worth the extra money.I wanted to share some advice my friend gave me: when wearing just 1 airpod, always use it in your uncomfortable ear. This tidbit of info helped my ears adjust to the airpods faster.
authors_reviews.author: D

authors_reviews.title: Love them
authors_reviews.text: **Rating: ★★★★★**I bought the Apple AirPods 4 Wireless Earbuds for my teenager, and they absolutely love them! Apple has really nailed the balance between style, comfort, and performance with these earbuds.The sound quality is excellent—crisp highs, balanced mids, and surprisingly deep bass for something so compact. My teenager is a big music fan, and they’ve been raving about how immersive and clear everything sounds, whether it’s their favorite playlists or streaming videos.The fit is another highlight. The earbuds sit securely and comfortably in their ears, even during long listening sessions or while being active. They come with multiple ear tip sizes, so it was easy to find the perfect fit for them. No complaints about discomfort or slipping out, even during workouts.The seamless pairing with Apple devices is a big plus—it’s effortless and reliable, and the battery life is impressive. They also love the sleek design and how lightweight they feel.Overall, these AirPods have been a hit. They’re worth every penny for the quality and convenience they offer. If you’re looking for a gift or an upgrade, these are a fantastic choice!
authors_reviews.author: Ryan1111

authors_reviews.title: Apple Écouteurs sans fil AirPods 4, écouteurs Bluetooth
authors_reviews.text: Excellent produit, son fiable sans bruit, je recommande cet article
authors_reviews.author: France

authors_reviews.title: Easy to Use and Just Work
authors_reviews.text: These AirPods are super easy to set up and connect instantly to my phone. The sound quality is great for everyday use, and they’re comfortable enough to wear for long periods without feeling annoying in your ears.Battery life has been solid, and I like how seamless they are with Apple devices — no fuss, no extra steps. They’re perfect for calls, music, and just daily use on the go.Simple, reliable, and exactly what I expected from AirPods.
authors_reviews.author: AKS

authors_reviews.title: I do think these are great but...
authors_reviews.text: After almost 2 months trying them out I can actually tell a lot of things about the new AirPods.Pros - the sound quality is good enough. Don't expect great bass and low frequencies, I mean, they are small, but audio is quite good. With the software update you can actually get a very crisp sound, clear enough to enjoy good music, podcasts, videos, and calls. Conversation clarity is great.Their sound cancellation is surprisingly great!! They also have this adaptive audio cancellation according to your surroundings which works pretty well. You can actually still hear very little noise, but is reduced quite good (even for this type of earbuds).Battery is good enough for me 3 to 4 hours depending on how I use them, and charging is also quite good.Cons - as other airpods, these will fall... a lot. To get the perfect fit is very difficult. I actually have the very first ones and I believe they fit better in my ears. Even I pointed out sound quality as a pro, it is also a con. If you want great bass sound, well... don't go for these. Range in sounds vary sometimes and overall listening to music sometimes is not quite sharp as I would like, though listening to videos, movies, and podcasts sound great.Price... as every other Apple product, I do think is quite overpriced, but again, I do think quality is good enough and superior to other buds.Overall they have very good features that I would like in other headphones/buds like adaptive audio, head tracking system, automatic equalization according to what you actually hear, 3D audio, etc...I do recommend them, but be aware that for some people these won't fit good enough... I would rather save more money and buy the pros.
authors_reviews.author: Jaime Martinez
